=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/catchAllToMapError_effectFn.ts(12,4): suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
/.src/catchAllToMapError_effectFn.ts(16,4): suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
/.src/catchAllToMapError_effectFn.ts(20,4): suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)


==== /.src/catchAllToMapError_effectFn.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    class MyErrorTagged {
      readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
      constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
    }
    
    // Effect.fn with catch that should be mapError
    export const shouldReportEffectFn = Effect.fn(function*() {
      return yield* Effect.fail("error")
    }, Effect.catch((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))))
       ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
    
    export const shouldReportEffectFnTraced = Effect.fn("traced")(function*() {
      return yield* Effect.fail("error")
    }, Effect.catch((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))))
       ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
    
    export const shouldReportEffectFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*() {
      return yield* Effect.fail("error")
    }, Effect.catch((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))))
       ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
    
    // Should NOT report: catch returning Effect.succeed
    export const shouldNotReportEffectFn = Effect.fn(function*() {
      return yield* Effect.fail("error")
    }, Effect.catch(() => Effect.succeed(42)))
